title: pilosella stenosoma
intro: Pilosella stenosoma, also known as Autumn Hawk's-beard, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion tribe. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Pilosella stenosoma include reducing symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders, such as IBS and ulcers, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. Pilosella stenosoma can be consumed as a herbal tea or tincture, and it is also used in traditional medicine preparations, such as infusions and salves, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
